title: handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. meridionalis
intro: Handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. meridionalis, commonly known as the yellow ipê, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest in Brazil, characterized by its bright yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. meridionalis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. meridionalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicine.
